---
format:
  html:
    code-link: true

execute:
  cache: true
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(countdown)
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
library(colorspace)
library(here)

```

## Coding exercise

For this exercise we'll be using the instructional dataset. [Download the dataset here](../../../datasets.html).
